announcement.text: Welcome to GMS Church Kuala Lumpur  ·  A Cell-based Church that is Apostolic and Prophetic  ·  Join us every Sunday

about.tagline: GMS Church Kuala Lumpur is a cell-based church that is apostolic and prophetic — carrying the same vision of GMS Indonesia to Kuala Lumpur.
about.body: GMS Church Kuala Lumpur is a branch of GMS Church Indonesia, carrying the same vision and spiritual DNA across borders. We are a cell-based church rooted in apostolic and prophetic foundations, called to make disciples and build lasting community in Malaysia.

visionMission.vision: A Cell-Based Church That Is Apostolic and Prophetic
visionMission.mission: 1,000 Strong Local Churches and 1,000,000 Disciples of Christ

eaglekidz.name: Eaglekidz
eaglekidz.tagline: Raising up the next generation in faith and the love of God.

aog.name: Army of God (AOG)
aog.tagline: Equipping teens and youth to be soldiers of God's Kingdom.

family.name: Family Service
family.tagline: Worship together as a family. Everyone is welcome.

pastor.label: Local Pastor
pastor.name: Ps. Oscar Andi
pastor.bio: Pastor Oscar Andi leads GMS Church Kuala Lumpur with a heart for people and a passion for building the Kingdom of God in Malaysia. Trained under the apostolic and prophetic culture of GMS Indonesia, he carries a deep conviction that every believer is called to be a disciple-maker. His ministry is marked by love for the local church, a hunger for the presence of God, and a commitment to see lives transformed.

giving.heading: Support the Work
giving.intro: Tithing and offering are not obligations — they are acts of worship and trust. As we give, we participate in God's work and open our hands to receive His blessing.
giving.quote: Each of you should give what you have decided in your heart to give, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver. — 2 Corinthians 9:7

connectGroup.heading: Connect Group
connectGroup.body: Connect Group is the small group of GMS, your spiritual family in which you are discipled to become more like Christ. Members encourage one another through testimonies and sharing of the Word. In this home for everyone, we serve each other, pray for one another, and grow together in faith.

contact.ctaBody: Have a question or want to know more? We'd love to hear from you.
